exception.rationale: Both variants branch to the same trap. The preceding identical unsigned object-size guard proves gpio_idx <= 15 on every state that reaches this redundant second guard, so stock 'gpio_idx == 16' and candidate 'gpio_idx > 15' are both false on all reachable states.
